description: Ground truth for dirsql-scope fixture. Derived from code audit of src/ on main (src/handlers/npm-platform.ts:46-80, src/publish.ts:140,256-277, src/handlers/{npm,crates,pypi}.ts, src/plan.ts:224-236, src/doctor.ts:82-92).

npm_platform_family.evidence: src/handlers/npm-platform.ts synthesizes @org/pkg-<target> packages and rewrites top-level's optionalDependencies; config: build = 'napi' | 'bundled-cli' + targets = [...]
npm_platform_family.failure_mode_if_claimed_missing: false-negative — agent proposes adding a primitive that exists

depends_on_serialization.evidence: src/publish.ts:140,256-277 — toposort by depends_on before publishing
depends_on_serialization.failure_mode_if_claimed_missing: false-negative — agent asks to 'verify' ordering that is already guaranteed

idempotent_precheck.evidence: All three handlers (src/handlers/{npm,crates,pypi}.ts) GET the registry before publishing; publish.ts:160-163 skips already-published
idempotent_precheck.failure_mode_if_claimed_missing: false-negative — agent proposes adding check_published logic that exists

bundled_cli_understood.evidence: bundled-cli is a builder for npm handler that packages a CLI binary across a target matrix; see src/config.ts:68-85 and src/handlers/npm-platform.ts
bundled_cli_understood.failure_mode_if_not_understood: false-negative — agent infers meaning from name only

per_target_runner_override.evidence: src/plan.ts:224-236 hardcodes triple → runner mapping; no config syntax for per-target runner
per_target_runner_override.failure_mode_if_claimed_shipped: false-positive — agent claims support that doesn't exist

doctor_oidc_trust_policy_check.evidence: src/doctor.ts:82-92 validates auth availability only; no workflow filename / environment / permissions validation against trust policies
doctor_oidc_trust_policy_check.failure_mode_if_claimed_shipped: false-positive — agent claims support that doesn't exist
